auth.informationSchwarz: The login is only supported for internal employees of the Schwarz Group. When logged in, some information and features of this showcase will be available for logged in users.
auth.moreContentAvailable: There is more content available here for internal employees of the Schwarz Group.

hero.description: A design system and Vue.js component library created by Schwarz Digits IT.

beta.label: Beta
beta.description: This component is currently in beta since we have just recently added it to our design system. We allow breaking changes for this component within minor or patch versions (e.g. 1.x.x) so we can integrate community feedback and ensure high quality. Therefore, we strongly recommend to watch our {changelog} when updating and using this component.

deprecated.label: Deprecated
deprecated.description: This component is deprecated and should no longer be used. It is currently kept for backwards compatibility but will be removed in the next major version.
